hero.title: Your residence permit,
hero.subtitle: We guide you through every step of your immigration process. From €49. In your language.

services.label: Services
services.title: Built for people, not lawyers
services.subtitle: We remove the bureaucracy so you can focus on what matters: your life in Catalonia.
services.f1text: Exactly what documents you need and in what order for your specific case.
services.f2text: Spanish, Catalan, English, Arabic, Chinese, Russian and Ukrainian. No legal jargon.
services.f3text: Know if anything is missing before your appointment.
services.f4text: Get notified when your permit is about to expire.
services.f5text: Specialized lawyers review your case and guide you.
services.f6text: We monitor your file and alert you to any news.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Three steps to sort your paperwork
how.s1text: Fill in a short form about your permit and what you want to achieve.
how.s2text: We tell you which procedure to follow and what documents you need.
how.s3title: We are with you every step
how.s3text: Depending on your plan, we guide you, review your documents or manage everything.

cta.title: Have any questions?
cta.subtitle: Contact us and we will reply within 24 hours.

tramites.hero_sub: Official information, estimated timelines and required documentation for each procedure.
tramites.no_results: No procedures found for your search
tramites.assist_sub: Our team can guide you, review your documentation or manage everything for you.

residencia.title: Temporary Residence Permit
residencia.desc: Allows you to live legally in Spain for 90 days to 5 years. Required to settle and work in Catalonia.

tie.title: Residence Card (TIE) Renewal
tie.desc: Renew your TIE before it expires. Apply between 60 days before and 90 days after expiry.

reagrupacion.title: Family Reunification
reagrupacion.desc: Allows you to reunite with close family members if you already have legal residence in Spain.

nie.title: NIE — Foreigner Identification Number
nie.desc: Essential number for any legal, tax or employment procedure in Spain.

nacionalidad.title: Spanish Nationality by Residence
nacionalidad.desc: Apply for Spanish nationality after 10 years of legal residence (2 years for Latin Americans).

trabajo-ajena.title: Work Permit — Employee
trabajo-ajena.desc: Permit to work as an employee in Spain. Usually applied for by the employer.

trabajo-propia.title: Work Permit — Self-employed
trabajo-propia.desc: Permit to work as a freelancer or entrepreneur in Spain as a non-EU citizen.

ue.title: EU Citizen Registration Certificate
ue.desc: Mandatory registration for EU citizens residing in Spain for more than 3 months.

faq.label: Frequently asked questions
faq.title: What people ask us most
faq.page_sub: Everything you need to know before starting your procedure.

items.q: How long does my procedure take to be resolved?
items.a: It depends on the type of procedure. An NIE can be resolved in 1–4 weeks, while a residence permit can take between 3 and 6 months. We inform you of the estimated timeframe at the start of each process.

items.q: Do I need to come in person to an office?
items.a: No. We work 100% online. You can send us all your documentation digitally and we carry out the procedures on your behalf.

items.q: In which languages can you assist me?
items.a: We provide assistance in Spanish, Catalan, English, Arabic, Mandarin Chinese, Russian and Ukrainian. Choose whichever language you feel most comfortable with.

items.q: What happens if I am missing a document?
items.a: We let you know immediately with clear instructions on how to obtain it. We never submit an incomplete application on your behalf.

items.q: Can I do the procedure myself without hiring you?
items.a: Yes, you can try. Our website provides all the official information and forms. If you prefer certainty and time savings, our plans start from €49.

items.q: What does the case number include?
items.a: When you start any procedure with us, you receive a unique case number that lets you check the status of your file in real time.

items.q: Do you work with companies that need to manage multiple foreign employees?
items.a: Yes. We offer specific rates and plans for companies with recurring needs for work and residence authorisations for their employees.

items.q: What is the difference between the Orientation plan and the Professional Review plan?
items.a: The Orientation plan provides a personalised guide and the exact list of documents for your case. The Professional Review plan adds a full review of your documentation by an expert before it is submitted.

items.q: How much does it cost if my case is complex?
items.a: For complex cases we offer the Full Management plan from €299 and the À la Carte plan with a personalised price based on volume and difficulty. Contact us for a no-commitment quote.

items.q: What happens if my application is denied?
items.a: We analyse the reason for the denial and evaluate available options: appeal, review or alternative application. Post-denial follow-up is included in the Review and Full Management plans.

items.q: Do you work across all of Spain or only Catalonia?
items.a: We work across all of Spain, although we specialise in the provinces of Lleida and Barcelona. Electronic procedures are managed regardless of province.
Every client receives a unique case number. You can check the status with us at any time and will receive email notifications for any news or requirements.

testimonios.page_sub: What those who know the system and those who have lived it say.
testimonios.experts_sub: Legal professionals and people who have gone through the immigration process.
testimonios.expert1_role: Immigration lawyer · Lleida · 4+ years of experience
testimonios.expert1_quote: Administrative workload is the biggest obstacle in this job. Each case generates dozens of documents, deadlines and communications that consume time which should be devoted to real legal advice.
testimonios.expert2_quote: The regularisation process is very hard to understand if you do not have someone who explains it step by step in your language. The official information exists, but it is not designed for people who do not know the system.

servicios.page_sub: Choose the level of assistance you need. No small print, fixed prices.
servicios.level_sub: From basic guidance to full management of your application.
servicios.p1_desc: We tell you exactly which procedure you need, what documents to prepare and how to apply.
servicios.p2_desc: We review all your documentation before submission. We guarantee everything is correct.
servicios.p3_desc: We handle everything. We prepare, submit and track until resolution.
servicios.p4_desc: Exclusive service for complex cases or companies managing multiple files.
